steps.speaker: Orochimaru
steps.text: Before I go... a parting gift. Something to make you crave power, Sasuke-kun.
His neck elongates. Fangs sink into Sasuke's shoulder. A black, three-tomoe mark spreads across the skin.

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: Aagh—! What... what did you do to me...?

steps.speaker: Orochimaru
steps.text: I've given you a reason to come find me. When the village can no longer satisfy your hunger... you'll know where to look. Kukuku...

steps.speaker: Sakura
steps.text: Sasuke-kun! Hang on — Kakashi-sensei, the mark, it's spreading!

steps.speaker: Kakashi
steps.text: I've sealed it for now. But a Cursed Seal feeds on a darkness already inside. Keep him close, Commander. The real exams — the Stadium finals — are next.
